reference: Pain in the leg has many causes. Are you also experiencing tingling and numbness in your leg? Are you a smoker? Do you also have pain when coughing or sneezing? These are typical signs of disc disease. Do not be scared; get an MRI of the lumbosacral spine. This will give us a good idea of how much the disc is prolapsed.
text: Even the light has many costs. You also have many sins in your life. When you sober, you also incur offenses. You can try to sin, but this takes the spirit. Not standing around the wrong people, friend. This will be worth it when you have accomplished this goal.
